RMINC 2.0.0.0
  • Reference

Internal function to read in a table or csv file potentially with many columns and extract just the one we need

Source: R/minc_interface.R
extract_column.Rd

Internal function to read in a table or csv file potentially with many columns and extract just the one we need

Usage

extract_column(filename, column = 1)

Arguments

filename

path to the vertex data file

column

-specify the column id (name or number) if input files have multiple columns

Value

a vector of vertex data corresponding to the file

On this page

Developed by Jason Lerch, Chris Hammill, Matthijs van Eede, Daniel Cassel.
